name: IonQ, Inc.
summary: IonQ, Inc. is a quantum platform company that develops and sells trapped-ion quantum computing hardware, quantum networking, quantum sensing, and quantum security products. The company sells access to quantum computers via cloud and on-premises deployments, and provides maintenance and support services. IonQ uses barium and ytterbium ions as qubits, targeting commercial and government customers across multiple sectors including defense, aerospace, automotive, and finance.

products.name: Trapped-Ion Quantum Computer
products.description: Quantum processing units using trapped barium and ytterbium ions for computation via cloud or on-premises deployment.

products.name: Quantum Networking Products
products.description: Products enabling interconnection of quantum processing units via photonic interconnects for distributed quantum computation.

products.name: Quantum Sensing Products
products.description: Sensors leveraging quantum mechanical properties for high-precision measurement applications.

products.name: Quantum Security Products
products.description: Security products utilizing quantum mechanical principles for enhanced cryptographic and communication security.

products.name: Cloud Quantum Computing Access
products.description: Access to quantum computers of various qubit capacities sold through cloud platforms including AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

products.name: IonQ Forte
products.description: IonQ's advanced quantum system featuring 35 algorithmic qubits and barium-based qubit technology.

products.name: IonQ Tempo
products.description: IonQ's next-generation quantum system designed for on-premises enterprise and government deployment.

partnerships.description: Cloud distribution partner providing access to IonQ quantum computers via Amazon Braket.
Cloud distribution partner providing access to IonQ quantum computers via Azure Quantum.
Cloud distribution partner providing access to IonQ quantum computers via Google Cloud Marketplace.
Exclusive license agreement providing IonQ access to foundational trapped-ion quantum computing technology.
